{| class="infobox"
! colspan="2" class="infobox-title" | {{{name}}}
|-
| class="infobox-label" | Type
| class="infobox-data" | Location
|-
| class="infobox-label" | Introduced
| class="infobox-data" | {{{introduced}}}
|}<noinclude>Location infobox (generated; styling in [[MediaWiki:Common.css]]).</noinclude>
